## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.49

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where audio starts but video still does not render.
- Routes X-Sense WebRTC cameras through an AlexxIT/WebRTC go2rtc-compatible raw H264 stream source.
- Repackages camera H264 RTP payloads for go2rtc without video transcoding.

### Debug Logging
- Adds ticket, stream, packet, frame, queue, and close summaries for the raw H264 stream path.
- Keeps the raw stream diagnostics compact and token-safe for follow-up camera reports.
